required: Bachelor’s Degree in computer science, information science, or a related field or experience.

Experience interacting with customers, including resolution of complex inquiries and efficient performance during high-volume timeframes.
Experience providing production support of mission critical systems.
Demonstrated written/oral communication, technical documentation, user liaising, and personal interaction abilities.
